channel.title: Corrosion Reviews
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Corrosion Reviews

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Yousif Hussein Azeez, Dyari Mustafa Mamand, Rebaz A. Omer, Awat Hamad Awla, Karzan A. Omar DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/corrrev-2024-frontmatter6

item.title: Ultra-high performance concrete with metal mine tailings and its properties: a review
item.description: Article by Yousif Hussein Azeez, Dyari Mustafa Mamand, Rebaz A. Omer, Awat Hamad Awla, Karzan A. Omar DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/corrrev-2023-0145

item.title: Research progress of corrosion inhibitors for high-temperature hydrochloric acid acidification
item.description: Article by Yousif Hussein Azeez, Dyari Mustafa Mamand, Rebaz A. Omer, Awat Hamad Awla, Karzan A. Omar DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/corrrev-2022-0053

item.title: Phytochemicals as eco-friendly corrosion inhibitors for mild steel in sulfuric acid solutions: a review
item.description: Article by Yousif Hussein Azeez, Dyari Mustafa Mamand, Rebaz A. Omer, Awat Hamad Awla, Karzan A. Omar DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/corrrev-2024-0018

item.title: Enhanced corrosion protection of rebars in alkaline solutions by ferroporphyrin and the mechanisms of electron consumption and lattice reconstruction
item.description: Article by Yousif Hussein Azeez, Dyari Mustafa Mamand, Rebaz A. Omer, Awat Hamad Awla, Karzan A. Omar DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/corrrev-2024-0012

item.title: Corrosion mechanism of K411 superalloy in sulfur-containing environment: sulfidation promoting internal nitridation
item.description: Article by Yousif Hussein Azeez, Dyari Mustafa Mamand, Rebaz A. Omer, Awat Hamad Awla, Karzan A. Omar DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/corrrev-2024-0005

item.title: Investigation of corrosion inhibition and adsorption properties of quinoxaline derivatives on metal surfaces through DFT and Monte Carlo simulations
item.description: Article by Yousif Hussein Azeez, Dyari Mustafa Mamand, Rebaz A. Omer, Awat Hamad Awla, Karzan A. Omar DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/corrrev-2024-0007
